heading: Procedure
body:
Do one of the following steps:

- Click New Project.

- Expand the Projects menu in the navigation
  bar, then click + New Project.

* Enter the name for your new project.

  > **Important:** The project name has the following limits:
  >
  > - Can't exceed 64 characters.
  >
  > - Restricted to letters, numbers, spaces, dashes, and
  >   underscores.
  >
  > Don't include [sensitive information](sensitive-info) in
  > your project name.

* Click Next.

- For existing Atlas users, enter their username. Usually, this
  is the email the person used to register.

- For new Atlas users, enter their email address to send an
  invitation.
